title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE PINAGSABANGAN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF NAUJAN, PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL MINDORO, TO JUAN L. LUNA MEMORIAL SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 527 / 50 OG No. 8, 3443 (August, 1954)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1104, June 15, 1954 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE PINAGSABANGAN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF NAUJAN, PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL MINDORO, TO JUAN L. LUNA MEMORIAL SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Pinagsabangan Elementary School in the municipality of Naujan, Province of Oriental Mindoro, is changed to Juan L. Luna Memorial School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 15, 1954.
